abp_assumptions.A8: Radisson Rewards retains competitive parity — no material member share loss to rival programmes

hedging_actions: Maintain a 'competitor move' response fund (EUR 2m) for rapid counter-promotions
Quarterly loyalty benchmarking review with CMO and VP Loyalty
NPS recovery threshold: trigger programme audit if member NPS drops below 40

indicators.name: Competitor loyalty rule changes
indicators.description: Major rule changes by rival programmes (devaluations, tier shifts, new benefits)
indicators.recommendation: 3 HIGH-impact competitor rule changes detected — Radisson Rewards response review required.

indicators.name: Competitor bonus promotions active
indicators.description: Live competitor loyalty promotions competing for Radisson member stays
indicators.recommendation: 7 competitor promotions active; 3 with ≥3x multiplier — counter-promotion or matched offer needed.

indicators.name: Radisson Rewards programme health
indicators.description: Key programme health metrics: enrolment, redemption, NPS, breakage
indicators.recommendation: 1 red + 3 yellow health metrics — programme health review needed.

indicators.name: Metric — tier_upgrade_rate (EMEA)
indicators.description: Worst-performing Radisson Rewards programme health metric
indicators.recommendation: tier_upgrade_rate (EMEA): 9.1 vs PY 11.8 — Slower than programme target

indicators.name: Member satisfaction gap vs. competitors
indicators.description: Radisson Rewards satisfaction scores vs top competitor programmes
indicators.source: J.D. Power EMEA Hotel Loyalty Survey
indicators.recommendation: Avg gap -12.6 pts vs competitors; worst -21.8 pts — major competitiveness deficit; programme redesign needed.
